info.name: Nexora CRM360 — Mock APIs
info.description:
Complete mock API collection for Nexora CRM360 development.

Covers: MSG91 WhatsApp, MSG91 SMS, Fast2SMS, TeleCMI Voice, Resend Email, and AI Services.

Setup: Import → Create Mock Server → Copy URL → Paste in Settings → Integrations → Postman.

response.name: Success
Success

item.name: MSG91 SMS
item.description: SMS flow and OTP endpoints (MSG91 format)

item.name: Fast2SMS
item.description: Indian SMS via Fast2SMS (quick, DLT, OTP routes)
